problem: What is the remainder when 5462 is divided by 9?

classified_questions.question: Can you explain what it means for a number to be congruent to the sum of its own digits modulo 9?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How can we find the sum of the digits of the number 5462?

classified_questions.question: Can you explain why the remainder when dividing the sum of the digits of 5462 by 9 is the same as the remainder when dividing 5462 by 9?
